# PRISM config — normally generated by `Run Prism — Init`.
# You should rarely edit this file by hand. Init interviews you and writes it.
# This template is kept here so the shape of the file is visible and for manual edits after the fact.
#
# Format: key: value. Blank lines and # comments are ignored.

# REQUIRED — feature slug in kebab-case.
feature: your-feature-name

# REQUIRED — 3 to 5 competitors.
# Preferred: homepage URLs. Init will fetch the hero headline for you.
# Fallback line format when a URL fetch fails: `Name | hero headline`
competitors:
  https://competitor-a.com
  https://competitor-b.com
  https://competitor-c.com

# OPTIONAL — subreddits to pull threads from. Comma-separated, no r/ prefix.
# If listed, PRISM fetches live. If omitted, drop a Reddit .txt into prism/inputs/ instead.
# subreddits: productivity, artificial, sideproject

# OPTIONAL — Twitter/X keywords to search.
# twitter_keywords: ai agents, work automation
